purpose: Freeze the thin executable command surface families for OPL platform brand modules and agent-owned internal brand-module spines without making them domain authority surfaces.
machine_boundary: This contract governs read-only CLI/read-model command surfaces derived from the brand module registry. It does not store domain truth, artifact or memory bodies, quality verdicts, owner receipts, typed blockers, production readiness, or App release truth.

module_spine.purpose: Domain-agent internal Charter spine that maps to the OPL platform charter module without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal Atlas spine that maps to the OPL platform atlas module without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal Workspace spine that maps to the OPL platform workspace module without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal Pack spine that maps to the OPL platform pack module without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal Stagecraft spine that maps to the OPL platform stagecraft module without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal Runway spine that maps to the OPL platform runway module without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal Ledger spine that maps to the OPL platform ledger module without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal Console spine that maps to the OPL platform console module without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal design and evolution spine that maps to OPL Foundry Kernel without becoming a platform module.
Domain-agent internal Connect spine that maps to the OPL platform connect module without becoming a platform module.

legacy_command_ownership.migration_target: Keep as aggregate registry/read-model while module-owned command surfaces provide per-module status/inspect/validate/doctor.
legacy_command_ownership.rationale: Aggregate registry remains the low-cost overview; per-module command surfaces prevent a single catch-all surface from hiding module gaps.

legacy_command_ownership.migration_target: Only opl workspace status|inspect are brand-read surfaces; validate, doctor, and interfaces keep existing workspace operational semantics.
legacy_command_ownership.rationale: Workspace already owns operational validation and topology lifecycle; brand CLI governance must not replace those semantics.

drift_guards: Every platform_command_surfaces.module_id must exist in brand-module-registry.json.

Every platform command surface must expose status, inspect, interfaces, validate, and doctor unless an existing operational command collision is explicitly listed in legacy_command_ownership; workspace brand governance only owns status and inspect because validate, doctor, and interfaces keep existing workspace operational semantics.
Agent internal modules are read-only branding spines under opl agents modules and cannot write domain truth, replace domain owners, or claim production readiness.
